response.original_title: How do I dispute an Uphold transaction? Quick resolution guide
response.overview: If you want to dispute a transaction on Uphold, you need to log in to your account and (Service Connect) +1 ⦗88 8⦘ ➳ 574 ➳ 7167  go to your transaction history to find the specific transaction you believe is incorrect, unauthorized, or problematic (24x7 Care)+1 ⦗88 8⦘ ➳ 574 ➳ 7167 . After selecting it, submit a support request through the official Uphold Help Center with all relevant details such as transaction ID, date, amount, payment method, (24x7) and reason for the dispute (Help Always) +1 ⦗88 8⦘ ➳ 574 ➳ 7167 . The support team will then review your case and may ask for additional identity verification or supporting information during the investigation (Help Online) +1 ⦗88 8⦘ ➳ 574 ➳ 7167. Depending on the findings, they may provide a refund, reversal, or clarification +1 ⦗88 8⦘ ➳ 574 ➳ 7167  (Fast Help Desk). It is important to report disputes as soon as possible for a faster resolution (Direct line) (1-888 @[Uphold]).
